examples: An enormous heaviness was coming over me.
The moment you start forgiving, you feel lot lighter and years of heaviness lifted magically!
For he longed after you all, and was full of heaviness, because that ye had heard that he had been sick.
Rose was driving her children home from a friend's house when she felt a heaviness in her chest.
The heaviness of being successful was replaced by the lightness of being a beginner again.
